1. ### Wes [Riven] _—_ 10/1/24, 4:38 PM
    
    As dawn breaks on the Nomen Heights with brilliant pink and gold hues, Riven is already up and moves through the camp with a relaxed air, kettle in hand, steam rising from freshly brewed tea. He pours a cup for Xamanthe, who watches curiously. "Morning," he says with a grin. "You ever have tea like this? Is this the centaur way?" Gone is the gloom of the Tors of Levenies replaced with easy confidence. Riven takes a sip of the spicy aromatic tea, eyes gleaming with mischief. "So, do centaurs ever race two leggers? Or are we not enough of a challenge? Once we get you patched up, I want a good race. My money is on Pavel or maybe Hyrum." He leaves the question open, inviting the group into the easy banter, his mood light and carefree under the wide, open sky.
    
2. _Riven pouring tea for Xamanthe_
    
    [](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1290578616102424606/1290579973450502184/riven-tea.webp?ex=6a1de103&is=6a1c8f83&hm=f8f04c60a3d00b75f0815642cd102cadf53abe8cbd7d0b7bed7fab7146eabcd4&)

3. @Danny @Darren [Pavel] @Slava [Astor] @Jon [Lucas] @Tom [Lee] @Billy [Milo]
    
4. ### Darren [Pavel] _—_ 10/2/24, 12:47 AM
    
    Pavel, standing nearby watching for Bird returning from his morning hunt, exchanges glances with Cat. “I don’t know, Cat. I checked him for head wounds after that last fight, and I didn’t see any. They say sudden personality shifts can be a result of psychic trauma as well as physical trauma, though, so maybe it was something internal…” He purses his lips, thinking. “Although…” He squints, cocks his head, and looks at Riven. “This reminds me of the way he used to act back when Nightmarch was small, helping everybody build their houses, distributing star berry pies, that sort of thing. Maybe he’s psychologically regressed to happier times.”
    
5. Cat yawns, apparently unimpressed. He shifts his gaze over to where Lucas ( @Jon [Lucas] ) is sitting on the ground. Cat stares intently at empty air to Lucas’s left, then pads silently over to that location and starts circling a spot on the ground, tail raised, a low rumble emanating from his chest. He bobs his head up and down as if rubbing its against something.
    
6. ### Danny _—_ 10/2/24, 2:25 AM
    
    Xamanthe listens to Riven’s invitation to race and looks down to her legs which are slowly regaining their movement after the Nomen enchanter removed her curse. “Out of respect and gratitude to you and the others for putting your lives at risk to save me, I won’t tell you what my response to that would have been a month ago. The humans have not generally been good to our kind, but I will never forget your kindness. Somehow I will pay my debt to you.” She then thinks of something and smiles to herself. “I know. We can have you all join the kinderfoal division race at the spring festival. That should give you a chance!” She laughs, and for the first time seems to relax. Her encounter with the boogeyman of her society has left her shaken, but there are gradual glimpses of her true personality beginning to show through. Still, worry creeps back into her brow after a moment. “I am concerned for our herd. Vordakai was far worse than even our legends tell. How will we survive? What brought him back after 100 thousand years? My mother is a strong leader, but this is a threat beyond imagination…”
    
7. ### Wes [Riven] _—_ 10/2/24, 12:08 PM
    
    Riven grins at Xamanthe’s mention of the kinderfoal race. "I’ll take that challenge. Just don’t be too surprised when Pavel takes the prize," he teases, eyes gleaming. Then, with a casual shift, he asks, "But really, how’d you end up in Vordekai’s tower? I can’t imagine he invited you over for tea." He takes a sip, giving her time before gently adding, "While you were there, did you learn anything… about him, or what he’s planning?" After a moment, Riven leans in, still relaxed but revealing a glimpse of the leader he is becoming. "If we’re going to finish this, we might need your herd’s help. Think they’d be willing to help back a mission to make sure Vordekai’s gone for good?" He smiles, the playful glint returning. "That way, next time we meet, we can race without any of that hanging over us."
    
8. ### Jon [Lucas] _—_ 10/3/24, 5:40 AM
    
    Lucas glances over at Cat, does a bit of a double-take, and then rolls his eyes. "After all that convincing to bring it back, now you like it? ... Of course! Sure! The _Cat_ isn't a disappointment! Fine! So much for familial loyalty..." Lucas continues to grumble for a minute before pulling out a hunk of dried meat from his pack and tossing it to Cat.
    
9. ### Darren [Pavel] _—_ 10/3/24, 6:33 AM
    
    Cat leaves off circling and approaches the meat. He lowers his head to it without touching. After a moment’s investigation, he saunters off into the brush, tail held high, leaving the meat on the ground.
    
10. ### Jon [Lucas] _—_ 10/4/24, 5:50 AM
    
    Lucas watches Cat go with an exasperated look on his face. Then he mumbles something to himself and goes back to meditating.
